name: Luhansk Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the sky and rivers of the Donbas
the wheat fields and the seventeen historic settlements

description: A blue field charged in the upper hoist with the coat of arms of Luhansk Oblast encircled by seventeen yellow stars (one for each historic raion).
history: Adopted as the official flag of Luhansk Oblast. The seventeen stars represent the historic administrative subdivisions (raions) of the oblast.

features.role: wreath of stars around the arms
features.symbolism: the seventeen historic raions of the oblast
